zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Gorball於大約1598年出生在英國素福爾可萊塔姆時，她的父親John Gorball24歲，母親Mary Christiana Filby23歲。她於1619年9月8日與Austin or Augustine Kilham在英國素福爾可萊塔姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1667年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Gorball于大约1598年出生在英国素福爾可萊塔姆时，她的父亲John Gorball24岁，母亲Mary Christiana Filby23岁。她于1619年9月8日与Austin or Augustine Kilham在英国素福爾可萊塔姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1667年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Gorball
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): perhaps a variant of Corney , a habitational name from Corney in Kirkham (Lancashire), with voicing of the initial consonant. Alternatively, a variant of Cornall, itself either a Lancashire variant of Corney (where -all and -ell are hypercorrect pronunciations of Cornah, Corner, and Cornoe, late pronunciations of Corney), or a variant of the Devon name Cornwall .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Gorball was born about 1598, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England, her father, John Gorball, was 24 and her mother, Mary Christiana Filby, was 23. She married Austin or Augustine Kilham on 8 September 1619, in Wrentham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 18 July 1667, in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Gorball est née environ 1598, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Gorball, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary Christiana Filby, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Austin or Augustine Kilham le 8 septembre 1619, à Wrentham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 juillet 1667, à Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Gorball um 1598 in Wrentham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Gorball 24 und ihre Mutter Mary Christiana Filby 23. Sie hat am 8. September 1619 in Wrentham, Suffolk, England Austin or Augustine Kilham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Juli 1667 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gorball è nata il circa 1598 nel Wrentham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Gorball, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mary Christiana Filby, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Austin or Augustine Kilham il 8 settembre 1619, nel Wrentham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 18 luglio 1667, nel Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Gorballが約1598年にイギリススフォルクウレンサムで生まれた時，父John Gorballは24歳，母Mary Christiana Filbyは23歳であった。1619年9月8日にイギリススフォルクウレンサムでAustin or Augustine Kilhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1667年7月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスウエンハムで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスウエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Gorball(이)가 대략 1598년 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Gorball(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Christiana Filby(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1619년 9월 8일 영국 수폴크 렌섬에서 Austin or Augustine Kilham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1667년 7월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 웬함에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 웬함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gorball nasceu aproximadamente 1598, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gorball, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary Christiana Filby, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Austin or Augustine Kilham em 8 de setembro de 1619, em Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de julho de 1667, em Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Gorball родилась около 1598 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Gorball было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Christiana Filby, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Austin or Augustine Kilham 8 сентября 1619 г. в местности рентам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 18 июля 1667 г. в местности венам, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности венам, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Gorball nació aproximadamente 1598, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gorball, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mary Christiana Filby, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Austin or Augustine Kilham el 8 de septiembre de 1619, en Wrentham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 18 de julio de 1667, en Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Wenham, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
